name: myinst
description: MyInst - Cofre pessoal de instruções e configurações de IA

scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test
scripts.compose:check: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config && docker compose --env-file deploy/.env.production.example -f docker-compose.vps.yml config && docker compose --env-file deploy/.env.production.example -f deploy/docker-compose.vps-api.yml config && docker compose --env-file deploy/.env.production.example -f deploy/docker-compose.shared-infra.yml config
scripts.deploy:vps-api: docker compose --env-file .env -f deploy/docker-compose.shared-infra.yml up -d && MYINST_COMPOSE_FILE=deploy/docker-compose.vps-api.yml MYINST_ENV_FILE=.env pnpm db:deploy:schema && docker compose --env-file .env -f deploy/docker-compose.vps-api.yml up -d --build
